brief_notes: Well-written compact atlas paper. All numbers match extraction: N=6, 4.7×10^9 pfu/mL, 5 loci, 150 nL, 25 μm, 87 nuclei, 1177.25±62.75 hypothalamus, 1065±22.39 midbrain/pons, 495.25±33.49 medulla, 237.5±15.08 forebrain, 104.75±4.64 cortex, 65.25±7.78 thalamus, 6 days survival, 18h primary Ab, 1:1000 and 1:700 dilutions, T13-L2 IML. Dense methods with faithful procedure details. No figures. Shorter discussion than orchestrated.
